extension.description: Classic ASP language support backed by asp-lsp.
configuration.title: Classic ASP LSP
configuration.locale.description: Display language for asp-lsp generated diagnostics, code actions, CodeLens, and extension messages. Auto follows the VS Code or LSP client locale.
configuration.defaultLanguage.descriptio: Default server-side script language for Classic ASP pages.
configuration.checkJs.description: Enable semantic checking for client JavaScript regions.
configuration.diagnostics.debounceMs.des: Delay, in milliseconds, before publishing diagnostics after text changes. Set to 0 to publish immediately.
configuration.debug.output.description: Controls asp-lsp debug timing logs in the VS Code Output channel. Off disables logs, summary logs operation start and completion, and verbose adds per-step timings.
configuration.javascript.unusedDiagnosti: Report unused JavaScript and JScript locals and parameters as hint diagnostics.
configuration.javascript.autoImports.des: Enable TypeScript-powered JavaScript and JScript auto import completions and quick fixes.
configuration.javascript.ignoreProjectCo: Ignore nearest tsconfig.json or jsconfig.json when building embedded JavaScript and JScript language service projects.
configuration.virtualRoot.description: Root directory used to resolve virtual include paths.
configuration.virtualRoots.description: Additional root directories used to resolve virtual include paths.
configuration.windowsPathResolution.desc: Resolve Classic ASP include paths case-insensitively like Windows and report diagnostics when include path casing differs from the file system. Disable to use the host file system behavior only.
configuration.legacyEncoding.description: Encoding used when reading unopened include files. Auto detection is used by default.
configuration.format.indentSize.descript: Indent size used by the Classic ASP formatter. When unset, editor formatting options are used.
configuration.format.indentStyle.descrip: Indent style used by the Classic ASP formatter. When unset, editor formatting options are used.
configuration.format.uppercaseKeywords.d: Format VBScript keywords using uppercase spelling.
configuration.format.ignoreVbscriptTagIn: Ignore parent tag indentation when formatting embedded VBScript regions.
Ignore parent tag indentation when formatting embedded CSS style elements.
configuration.format.ignoreJavaScriptTag: Ignore parent tag indentation when formatting embedded JavaScript and JScript regions.
configuration.format.onSave.description: Return full-document formatting edits from textDocument/willSaveWaitUntil. Disabled by default.
configuration.vbscript.typeChecking.desc: Controls VBScript type diagnostics. Strict enables type mismatch, member, and call checks.
configuration.vbscript.identifierCase.de: Reports VBScript declaration names that do not match the selected identifier casing. Use ignore to disable naming hints.
configuration.vbscript.identifierCaseByK: Overrides VBScript identifier casing per declaration kind.
configuration.vbscript.comTypes.descript: Custom COM type catalog keyed by Prog.ID for Server.CreateObject type checking and completion.
Members exposed by this COM object.
configuration.vbscript.comTypes.memberSt: Property type shorthand, for example String, ADODB.Recordset, or String | Number.
configuration.vbscript.comTypes.type.des: Property or return type. Use | for union types.
configuration.vbscript.comTypes.returnTy: Method return type. Overrides type when present. Use | for union types.
configuration.vbscript.comTypes.paramete: Parameter type shorthand. Use | for union types.
configuration.vbscript.globals.descripti: Runtime or framework-provided VBScript globals keyed by identifier.
configuration.vbscript.globals.string.de: Global object type shorthand, for example MyCompany.Repository or String | Nothing.
configuration.vbscript.globals.type.desc: Global object type. Use | for union types.
configuration.vbscript.unusedDiagnostics: Report unused VBScript declarations as hint diagnostics.
configuration.vbscript.syntaxSnippets.de: Enable VBScript syntax snippet completions for common control flow and declaration blocks.
configuration.vbscript.syntaxKeywords.de: Enable context-aware VBScript syntax keyword completions.
configuration.vbscript.initializedDimQui: Controls the quick fix style for initialized VBScript Dim declarations. newline rewrites to two statements on separate lines, and sameLineColon rewrites to Dim a : a = value.
configuration.vbscript.ifSyntaxDiagnosti: Controls how strictly VBScript If and ElseIf syntax is checked.
configuration.inlayHints.variableTypes.d: Show inferred VBScript variable type inlay hints.
Show VBScript procedure parameter name inlay hints.
configuration.inlayHints.functionReturnT: Show inferred VBScript function return type inlay hints.
configuration.inlayHints.implicitByRef.d: Show ByRef inlay hints for VBScript parameters whose passing mode is omitted.
configuration.inlayHints.globalVariableM: Controls VBScript variable scope markers in type inlay hints: global shows only (global), local shows only (local), all shows both, and uncertain in-progress include analysis may use (?).
configuration.codeLens.references.descri: Show VBScript reference count CodeLens entries.
configuration.codeLens.referenceProcedur: Show VBScript procedure reference count CodeLens entries for functions, subs, methods, and properties.
Show VBScript top-level variable and constant reference count CodeLens entries.
Show VBScript class reference count CodeLens entries.
configuration.codeLens.referenceClassMem: Show VBScript class field and class constant reference count CodeLens entries.
configuration.codeLens.referenceScope.de: Controls whether VBScript reference count CodeLens uses the whole workspace or only currently analyzed files.
configuration.codeLens.includes.descript: Show Classic ASP include CodeLens entries.
configuration.graph.showRootNodes.descri: Show root file nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showFileNodes.descri: Show non-root file nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showFunctionNodes.de: Show function nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showSubNodes.descrip: Show subroutine nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showClassNodes.descr: Show class nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showMethodNodes.desc: Show class method nodes with unknown procedure kind in graph views.
configuration.graph.showMethodFunctionNo: Show class function method nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showMethodSubNodes.d: Show class sub method nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showPropertyNodes.de: Show class property nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showMemberNodes.desc: Show built-in, configured, and unresolved object member nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showGlobalVariableNo: Show global VBScript variable and object nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showGlobalConstantNo: Show global VBScript constant nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showLocalVariableNod: Show procedure-local VBScript variable and class field nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showLocalConstantNod: Show procedure-local and class constant nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.showParameterNodes.d: Show function, sub, method, and property parameter nodes in graph views.
Show unresolved reference nodes in graph views.
configuration.graph.hideSingleNodes.desc: Hide non-root nodes that have no visible links in graph views.
configuration.graph.showOutgoingSelectio: Also highlight links that start from the selected node in graph views.
configuration.graph.showIncludeLinks.des: Show include links in graph views.
configuration.graph.showDeclareLinks.des: Show declaration-to-source links in graph views.
configuration.graph.showReferenceLinks.d: Show reference links in graph views.
configuration.graph.showCallLinks.descri: Show call links in graph views.
Show unresolved reference links in graph views.
configuration.graph.showMemberLinks.desc: Show object member reference and call links in graph views.
configuration.graph.openLocation.descrip: Controls where graph views open: active editor group or beside the current editor.
configuration.cache.enabled.description: Persist unopened workspace analysis results on disk.
configuration.cache.directory.descriptio: Directory used for Classic ASP LSP disk analysis cache. Leave empty to use the OS temporary directory.
configuration.cache.ttlHours.description: Hours before disk analysis cache entries expire.
configuration.cache.maxSizeMb.descriptio: Maximum disk analysis cache size in megabytes.
configuration.workspace.maxIndexFiles.de: Maximum number of unopened Classic ASP workspace files indexed per scan.
configuration.workspace.scanChunkSize.de: Number of filesystem entries processed before yielding during workspace indexing.
configuration.workspace.busyAnalysisConc: Maximum workspace analysis concurrency. Set 0 to use half of the available CPU count.
configuration.workspace.vbProjectMaxDocu: Maximum number of documents included in one full VBScript project context and include cycle traversal.
configuration.workspace.vbProjectMaxText: Maximum total text size, in bytes, included in one full VBScript project context and include cycle traversal.
configuration.iis.url.description: URL opened by the Classic ASP IIS debug helper command.
configuration.iis.webRoot.description: Web root used by the Classic ASP IIS debug helper command.
configuration.iis.browser.description: VS Code debug type used by the Classic ASP IIS debug helper command.
configuration.iisExpress.url.description: URL opened by the Classic ASP IIS Express debug helper command.
configuration.iisExpress.webRoot.descrip: Web root used by the Classic ASP IIS Express debug helper command.
configuration.iisExpress.browser.descrip: VS Code debug type used by the Classic ASP IIS Express debug helper command.
command.restartServer.title: Classic ASP: Restart Language Server
command.reindexWorkspace.title: Classic ASP: Reindex Workspace
command.clearCache.title: Classic ASP: Clear All Analysis Caches
command.clearDiskCache.title: Classic ASP: Clear Disk Analysis Cache
command.clearProcessCache.title: Classic ASP: Clear Process Analysis Cache
command.openOutput.title: Classic ASP: Open Output
command.showCurrentFileGraph.title: Classic ASP: Show Current File Graph
command.showWorkspaceGraph.title: Classic ASP: Show Workspace Graph
command.debugIisUrl.title: Classic ASP: Debug IIS URL
command.debugIisExpressUrl.title: Classic ASP: Debug IIS Express URL
command.createLaunchConfig.title: Classic ASP: Create Browser Launch Config
taskDefinition.task.description: Classic ASP LSP workspace task name.
capability.untrustedWorkspaces.descripti: Classic ASP LSP runs local analysis and does not require workspace trust for language features.
